title: magnolia keiskei
intro: Magnolia keiskei, also known as the Japanese magnolia, is a species of evergreen tree native to Japan and Taiwan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Magnolia keiskei include reducing symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Magnolia keiskei can be prepared as herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
